headline: Jim Cramer Gives His Opinion On SoFi, GoodRx And More
summary: On CNBC's "Mad Money Lightning Round," Jim Cramer said "he is a buyer of Anthony Noto," the CEO of SoFi Technologies Inc (NASDAQ: SOFI).

headline: FAANG Stocks In First-half: Last Year's Laggards Google, Facebook Come On Top As Apple, Amazon And Netflix Fall Off
summary:
The broader market witnessed some scare in the early part of the first half of 2021 but came back up strongly to stay close to record territory.

The volatility seen in the broader market was largely a function of the swings in technology stocks, especially the big ones.

headline: If You Invested $1,000 In Tesla Stock After Elon Musk Appeared On 'The Simpsons,' Here's How Much You'd Have Now
summary: Elon Musk is one of the most famous people on the face of the planet. As such, Musk has also appeared in several movies and on television shows.

headline: As Amazon Readies For Prime Day, Rival Retailers Prepare Their Own Sales Events
summary: Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) is preparing for its sixth annual Prime Day sales event that offers Amazon Prime members big discounts across nearly all categories on the e-commerce site.

headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech: Incyte, Ascendis FDA Decisions, Liver Congress Presentations And 4 IPOs
summary: Biotech stocks came under pressure in the week ended June 18, dragged by the negative sentiment that prevailed in the broader market due to macroeconomic worries.
